headline: Broadridge: Model Portfolios Projected To Reach $18.6T by 2030
summary: The firm projects double-digit growth for the model portfolios industry for the next four years.

headline: Broadridge and Fispoke Announce Strategic Collaboration to Bring Private Banking and Lending Capabilities to Independent Wealth Firms
summary: NEW YORK, June 17, 2026--Fispoke and Broadridge expand access to private banking and lending solutions for RIAs, advisors, and wealth platforms.

raw.headline: Broadridge and Fispoke Announce Strategic Collaboration to Bring Private Banking and Lending Capabilities to Independent Wealth Firms

headline: Broadridge Joins Anthropic's Project Glasswing
summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: BR), a global Fintech leader, today announced it has joined Anthropic's Project Glasswing, a new industry initiative focused on using frontier AI models to help secure the world's most critical software and strengthen cyber defense. Broadridge's participation underscores its commitment to supporting the security of the financial services industry.
